title: Mouse Cardiac Perfusion Fixation and Brain Collection
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9pd7c","text":"This protocol describes the procedures for intracardiac perfusion fixation of postnatal mice, including anesthesia, exsanguination, fixation, brain removal and post-fixation storage.
